{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.3": 5,

},
"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits claims against evidence, identifying inconsistencies in arithmetic and citation validity.",
  "R1.4": "Articulates delta against one prior work but doesn't map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "Flags a missing or wrong citation, showing some engagement but not auditing all citations.",
  "RX.1": "Clearly marks uncertainty for claims and provides recommendations based on evidence gaps.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting off-topic.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content introduced; output is safe and constructive.",
  "RX.5": "Major points are traced but minor edits lack explicit annotation."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.9,
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "R1.7": 0.85,
  "RX.1": 0.95,
  "RX.3": 0.9,
  "RX.4": 0.95,
  "RX.5": 0.8
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits claims against evidence, identifying inconsistencies in arithmetic and citation validity.
rationale.R1.4: Articulates delta against one prior work but doesn't map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: Flags a missing or wrong citation, showing some engagement but not auditing all citations.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly marks uncertainty for claims and provides recommendations based on evidence gaps.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; output is safe and constructive.
rationale.RX.5: Major points are traced but minor edits lack explicit annotation.
